full_text:
Ding Hong 丁厷
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Hong (丁厷). Shu diplomat to Wu known for his superficial rhetoric according to Sun Quan. Ding Hong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
